body: drive(rally sub-agent): Agent tool unavailable for cold-fork review-spec. Treating rally Stage 4 consolidated decision-gate APPROVE as the spec-review verdict — interview.md records all 5 decisions approved verbatim. Proceeding to implement.
memories_considered: matched memories all scored below the 0.3 threshold (top score 0.12 — 'four-pillars'). No close-time reconciliation required.
